mainEntity.name: What does "Deceased" *critically* mean on USPS tracking, and what are my *immediate* next steps?

acceptedAnswer.text: "Deceased" is a *critical and sensitive delivery impediment*. It means the addressee is deceased. *Immediately* contact the sender to inform them of the situation. Then, contact your local post office to arrange for the package to be returned to the sender. For *urgent, step-by-step guidance* on handling this delicate situation, *uspostaltracking.com is your indispensable resource.*
